# DiabeticLedger

> DiabeticLedger is the public, hash-chained giving ledger of OpenDiabetic — the proof surface. It follows every dollar end to end (donation → hosted rig → income → give → job) as tamper-evident receipts. Anyone can recompute and verify every SHA-256 link in their own browser. It holds NON-PHI receipts only — the money layer, never the health layer.

DiabeticLedger is the trust/proof half of OpenDiabetic, the "anti-rug-pull":
- Every donation, every dollar the compute earns, every give and every job is recorded as a receipt.
- Each receipt's hash links to the one before it — change a single character anywhere and the chain breaks.
- The page recomputes the entire chain in the visitor's own browser against the receipts. Trust no one; recompute it.
- No protected health information (PHI) ever appears on the ledger. This is the money layer, not the health layer.

## How it works
- The single source of truth is the hive's live giving ledger; if the hive is unreachable, the page falls back to the last committed snapshot so the proof is always up.
- The verifier re-implements the exact canonical form the ledger uses (sorted keys, no spaces, ASCII-escaped) to reproduce every SHA-256 link independently.
- Receipt kinds: donation, asset (hosted rig), income, give, job.

## Doctrine
- Honest status only — the page states only what the data supports. No vaporware, no overclaim.
- Privacy-first: NON-PHI receipts only.
- "Give people what they need, not what you have." The compute earns income; the net comes back to the people.

## Links
- https://diabeticledger.com — the public, browser-verified giving ledger (this site)
- https://opendiabetic.com — the hive: the model, what's live, ways to give
- https://localdiabetic.com — LocalDiabetic: the member's home vault and reminders
- https://github.com/SudoSuOps/diabetic-ledger — source + raw ledger

## Important
DiabeticLedger is a transparency/accounting surface, not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment, and not a medical provider.
